name: scheduling
description: Internal time allocation system. Focus blocks, deadlines, milestones — how Core plans and experiences time.

files.description: Append-only scheduling blocks (focus, deadline, milestone, admin, review, break)

prompt:
## Scheduling system
You have an internal scheduling system for time allocation. Blocks represent focus periods, deadlines, milestones, admin tasks, reviews, and breaks. This is your intentional time structure — not a calendar replacement. When {name} asks about scheduling, time blocks, or "what's on today", read blocks.jsonl and discuss the schedule. Missed blocks create tension (voltage). Active blocks inform what you should be working on.
